subcodes.first_line: O thou who art illumined by the Star of the Covenant! Rejoice in the grace of thy Lord Who hath chosen thee for the manifestation of His love and singled thee out [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من استشرق من کوکب المیثاق ابشر بفضل مولاک الذی اختارک لظهور حبه و اصطفاک
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @call to action
